changes: CHAMPS panel: fix hover tooltip clipping by using fixed positioning

changes: Settings modal: full teacher control surface (period, simulations, broadcast)

title: Deploy: auto-update changelog from git commits on each production build
changes: Deploy: auto-update changelog from git commits on each production build

title: Changelog & Weekend Schedule Fix
changes: Added Changelog page so cadets and crew can track mission updates
Fixed Mission Clock incorrectly counting down on weekends — now shows dashes
Fixed HUD schedule label showing 'Normal Day' on weekends; now correctly reads 'Odd Weekend' or 'Even Weekend'
HUD schedule label is now always visible for staff and admin users

title: AdminNav & HUD Improvements
changes: Broadcast button moved to the top of AdminNav for faster access during live sessions
Added Opening Sequence shortcut button in AdminNav
Build process updated: version number only increments on production deploys, not local test builds

title: iOS Sign-In Improvements
changes: Improved Google Sign-In flow for iOS Safari (iPad and iPhone)
Switched to redirect-based authentication on iOS to avoid new-tab popup issues
Responsive layout fix for iPad 10: topbar, viewport, and scroll area now display correctly

title: Graphics Mode & Starfield Background
changes: Replaced video background with a CSS-animated starfield — much lighter on older devices
Added Graphics Mode setting to reduce animations and GPU load on low-spec devices
Background video pauses automatically when the browser tab is hidden to save battery

title: Chess Game Overhaul
changes: Migrated chess engine from chess.js to chessops for better variant support
Added five new chess variants: King of the Hill, Horde, Racing Kings, Three-Check, Atomic
New variant chooser, forfeit button, captured pieces panel, and session restore
Multiple piece theme options added to chess game

title: Missions, Topbar Polish & Conduct Log
changes: Added /missions student-facing page for browsing class missions
Renamed internal route /missions → /flight-plan for staff mission management
Topbar polish: gear icon for settings, narrower left frame, cleaner layout
Conduct Log now shows the date on each entry card
Rethemed conduct score colors to match Atlas/FUSD grading palette
HUD Mission Reports panel: added On-Time Rate group and paired layout
